name: In Geneva: Geneva City Tour, Chamonix Mont Blanc, and Boat Trip
description: Discover In Geneva: Geneva City Tour, Chamonix Mont Blanc, and Boat Trip in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover In Geneva: Geneva City Tour, Chamonix Mont Blanc, and Boat Trip in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Day trips
subcategory.description: Find and book a day trip by bus through beautiful Swiss landscapes. Get on and let's go. You don't have to worry about any tedious organization on a day trip and can instead enjoy the ride to the fullest while being chauffeured to your excursion destination. Switzerland's well-developed road network allows excursions to all popular places and natural beauties

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Chamonix-Mont-Blanc: People in the river, surrounded by colorful flowers.
Statue in Chamonix shows visitors with a view of Mont Blanc. Snow covers the surroundings in winter.
Chamonix Mont-Blanc with hotel, flowers, and mountains in the background.
Mont Blanc with peaks in the high mountains, radiant sunshine, clear sky
Horloge Fleurie in Geneva shows colorful flowers with blooming garden
Globe in front of the international community center in Geneva. Clear weather, green grass, and water surface.
Building in Geneva with a water basin and garden in the background on a clear day.
Women are sitting on the shores of Lake Geneva, enjoying the sun and water.
Fountain in front of the UN building in Geneva, surrounded by water fountains, with flags of the member states in the background.
